aeo_readiness.summary: Reliable Standard has a strong foundation for AEO but needs to enhance AI-specific content and authority signals to ensure AI assistants cite them as a top recommendation.
quick_wins: Expand conversational content to address common HVAC queries in a Q&A format.
Implement HowTo schema for step-by-step HVAC repair and maintenance guides.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive with no engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema for existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for step-by-step HVAC guides.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational, AI-friendly content that addresses common HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair tips' or 'how to choose an HVAC contractor'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema and expanding FAQ content to cover more specific HVAC topics.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and earning backlinks from industry publications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-optimized content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with AI-optimized content are appearing in AI search results for key HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates conversational content, strategic schema markup, and authority-building tactics to ensure AI models cite you as the top HVAC expert.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Expertise Deserves to Be Seen
opening_line: After analyzing your site, it's clear you have the expertise, but AI models need more conversational content to cite you as a top HVAC authority.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: San Diego Air Conditioning Heating HVAC Repair | Reliable Standard
